sections.middle: NO. 081 Magnet Pokémon HT: 1'00" WT: 13.2 lbs. Thunder Wave Flip a coin. If heads, your opponent's Active Pokémon is now Paralyzed. Self-Destruct 50 This Pokémon does 50 damage to itself. It moves while constantly hovering.
sections.bottom: weakness ×2 resistance -20 It discharges Thunder Wave and so on from the units at its sides. retreat cost Illus. Keiji Kinebuchi ©2016 Pokémon 37/108
